title: A Promise from Years Ago
content: When they finished high school, Ava and Lucas promised that if they were both single at thirty, they would meet again at their favorite lake. It had started as a joke, but neither completely forgot about it. Years later, curiosity brought both of them back to the same place on the same afternoon. They laughed when they realized they had both remembered. As they walked beside the water, they discovered they still enjoyed each other's company. The promise had survived the passing years, quietly waiting for the right moment.
